text: The committee decided to postpone the meeting until next week due to the absence of several key members.
source_text: Das Komitee beschloss, die Sitzung auf nächste Woche zu verschieben, da mehrere wichtige Mitglieder abwesend waren.

text: The new policy will effect all employees starting from January, including those who work part-time in the remote offices.
source_text: Die neue Richtlinie wird ab Januar alle Mitarbeiter betreffen, einschließlich derjenigen, die in Teilzeit in den Außenstellen arbeiten.

text: Scientists have discovered a new species of deep-sea fish that can survive in extremely high pressures and low temperatures.
source_text: Les scientifiques ont découvert une nouvelle espèce de poisson des grands fonds capable de survivre dans des pressions extrêmement élevées et des températures basses.

text: The president announced that the country will invest heavily in the renewable energies to reduce the carbon footprint by 50% until 2030.
source_text: Le président a annoncé que le pays investira massivement dans les énergies renouvelables pour réduire l'empreinte carbone de 50 % d'ici 2030.

text: The hospital reported that the number of patients with respiratory infections has raised significantly during the winter months.
source_text: O hospital informou que o número de pacientes com infecções respiratórias aumentou significativamente durante os meses de inverno.

text: According to the latest report, the economy growed by 3.2 percent in the second quarter, surpassing analyst expectations.
source_text: Según el último informe, la economía creció un 3,2 por ciento en el segundo trimestre, superando las expectativas de los analistas.

text: The researchers found that regular exercises can significantly reduce the risk of cardiovascular disease in elderly populations.
source_text: I ricercatori hanno scoperto che l'esercizio fisico regolare può ridurre significativamente il rischio di malattie cardiovascolari nelle popolazioni anziane.

text: The ministry of education has proposed reforms that would make the university tuition free for students from low-income backgrounds.
source_text: Das Bildungsministerium hat Reformen vorgeschlagen, die den Studiengebühren für Studierende aus einkommensschwachen Verhältnissen abschaffen würden.

text: Climate change is causing the glaciers in the Alps to melt at a unprecedented rate, threatening water supplies for millions of people.
source_text: Le changement climatique fait fondre les glaciers des Alpes à un rythme sans précédent, menaçant l'approvisionnement en eau de millions de personnes.

text: The company announced they will lay off approximately 500 workers as part of a restructuring plan to improve the profitability.
source_text: La empresa anunció que despedirá a aproximadamente 500 trabajadores como parte de un plan de reestructuración para mejorar la rentabilidad.
